mapper.select:
select * from knowledge_document
and category = #{category}
and (title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or keywords like concat('%',#{keyword},'%'))
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into knowledge_document(title, content, source, file_url, keywords, category, view_count, like_count, create_time) values(#{title}, #{content}, #{source}, #{fileUrl}, #{keywords}, #{category}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{createTime})
